restaurant.name: Port Edward
restaurant.tagline: Waterfront Fine Dining on the Fox River

items.name: Jumbo Shrimp Cocktail
items.description: Five chilled jumbo Gulf shrimp with house-made cocktail sauce and lemon

items.name: Oysters Rockefeller
items.description: Half-dozen baked oysters with spinach, Pernod cream, and Parmesan breadcrumbs

items.name: Seared Ahi Tuna
items.description: Sesame-crusted sushi-grade tuna, wasabi aioli, pickled ginger, and soy reduction

items.name: Bruschetta Trio
items.description: Toasted crostini topped with tomato-basil, roasted pepper, and olive tapenade

items.name: New England Clam Chowder
items.description: Rich and creamy house-recipe chowder with littleneck clams, potato, and bacon

items.name: French Onion Soup
items.description: Classic caramelized onion broth with a Gruyère crouton gratin

items.name: Wedge Salad
items.description: Crisp iceberg wedge, blue cheese crumbles, grape tomatoes, bacon lardons, blue cheese dressing

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine hearts, shaved Parmigiano-Reggiano, house-made croutons, anchovy Caesar dressing

items.name: Pan-Roasted Atlantic Salmon
items.description: Herb-crusted salmon fillet, lemon beurre blanc, roasted asparagus, wild rice pilaf

items.name: Lobster Tail
items.description: Cold-water lobster tail, drawn butter, grilled lemon — market price

items.name: Walleye Almondine
items.description: Lake Superior walleye, toasted almond brown butter, haricots verts, fingerling potatoes

items.name: Seafood Bouillabaisse
items.description: Lobster, shrimp, mussels, clams, and white fish in saffron-tomato broth with grilled sourdough

items.name: Grilled Swordfish
items.description: Center-cut swordfish steak, mango-pineapple salsa, coconut jasmine rice

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: 8oz center-cut USDA Prime filet, peppercorn demi-glace, truffle whipped potatoes

items.name: Bone-In Ribeye
items.description: 20oz bone-in cowboy cut, garlic herb compound butter, roasted root vegetables

items.name: Rack of Lamb
items.description: Dijon-herb crusted New Zealand rack, rosemary jus, mint chimichurri, roasted garlic mash

items.name: Surf & Turf
items.description: 6oz filet mignon paired with a cold-water lobster tail — the best of both worlds

items.name: Lobster Fettuccine
items.description: Fresh fettuccine, Maine lobster, cherry tomatoes, light cream sauce, fresh basil

items.name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Arborio rice, porcini, chanterelle, shiitake, white truffle oil, aged Parmesan

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Classic vanilla bean custard with caramelized sugar crust and fresh berries

items.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
items.description: Warm Valrhona chocolate cake with molten center, vanilla bean gelato, raspberry coulis

items.name: Seasonal Sorbet Trio
items.description: Three scoops of house-made fruit sorbet — ask your server for today's flavors
